60%
Team type

Transfers are club-only — national teams don't sign players.

Text

Left team is the one picked at the top; the right team comes from Two-team card below.

Result

One line = one event. Write the name and minute, e.g. Saka 23'. For a red card add (R), e.g. Rice 78' (R).

Player stats

Fill only the stats you want — empty ones are hidden. The player name comes from the Player field above.

Two-team card

Left takes the colors of the team selected above, right takes this one's. On 50/50, each side brightens toward the seam using whichever of its own colors 2/3 is lighter, so dark second colors don't muddy the middle. Text crossing the seam gets whichever of white or black reads on all the bands.

Left is the team picked at the top; the right team is the one here. The card splits vertically, each team on its own color.
